org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AnchorLocation

    org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

    • Uses of AnchorLocation in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor with parameters of type AnchorLocation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected Point2D InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure.getConnectionPointFrom(Point2D position, Point2D absoluteAnchorPosition, AnchorLocation location)
      Replies the best connection point from the specified point to this anchor figure.
      protected abstract Point2D AnchorFigure.getConnectionPointFrom(Point2D position, Point2D absoluteAnchorPosition, AnchorLocation location)
      Replies the best connection point from the specified point to this anchor figure.
      protected Point2D AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure.getConnectionPointFrom(Point2D position, Point2D absoluteAnchorPosition, AnchorLocation location)
      Replies the best connection point from the specified point to this anchor figure.
      protected Point2D AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure.getConnectionPointFrom(Point2D position, Point2D absoluteAnchorPosition, AnchorLocation location)
      Replies the best connection point from the specified point to this anchor figure.
      static Point2D AnchorFigure.getRelativeAnchorOriginPoint(Figure node, AnchorLocation location)
      Return the origin point in the given node from the given anchor location.

    • Uses of AnchorLocation in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism that return AnchorLocation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      AnchorLocation Anchor.getLocation()
      Gets the location of the Anchor according to the owner
      AnchorLocation AbstractAnchor.getLocation()
      Gets the location of the Anchor according to the owner
      static AnchorLocation AnchorLocation.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static AnchorLocation[] AnchorLocation.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism with parameters of type AnchorLocation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Node.addAnchor(AnchorLocation location, A anchor)
      Attached a anchor to this Node.
      void Anchor.setLocation(AnchorLocation location)
      Sets the location of the Anchor according to the owner The name of the property is "anchorLocation".
      void AbstractAnchor.setLocation(AnchorLocation location)
      Sets the location of the Anchor according to the owner The name of the property is "anchorLocation".
